title: Announcement for Recruitment of Lecturer
content:
Announcements

Details

Date: 03 December 2017

Announcement for Recruitment of Lecturer

Lecturers shall be recruited for the departments of our faculties as per articles 23, 25 and 26 of Law no.2547 and the relevant articles of the Regulation on the Promotion and Appointment of Lecturers.

- The post of Professor has full-time status and candidates must apply to our Rectorship by submitting the six-part documentation including their petition containing information regarding the department they are applying to and "Main Research Work", their curriculum vitaes, notarised associate professorship certificate, communiques and references thereto, doctorate studies they supervised and their potential contribution to our University within 15 days from the publication date of the present announcement by

18/12/2017 Monday 17:30

in person or by mail.

- The post of Associate Professor has full-time status and candidates must apply to our Rectorship by submitting four copies each of their petition, their Scientific Work and Published Papers, their curriculum vitaes and notarised associate professorship certificate within 15 days from the publication date of the present announcement by

in person or by mail.

- The post of Assistant Professor has full-time status and candidates must apply to our Rectorship by submitting four copies each of their petition, their Scientific Work and Published Papers, their curriculum vitaes and notarised doctorate certificate within 15 days from the publication date of the present announcement by

18/12/2017 Monday 17:30

in person or by mail.

Diplomas received from foreign institutions must be approved for equivalency.
